titleStmt.title: SII 16.305: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 305. (A.R. No. 377 of 1904.) KALAMAḶḶA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up close to the east wall of the Āñjanēya shrine in the Chennakēśava temple.
This is dated Śaka 1515, Vijaya, Kārtika śu. 12, corresponding to 1593 A.D., October 26.

The king is stated to have been ruling from Penugoṇḍa. It records a gift of income derived from the market cess (pēṇṭasuṅkham) to the god Chennakēśava by the agent (kāryakartta) (name lost) of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandēla Aubhaḷrājayya-mahārāju. The donor bears the epithet Kaṭahari.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1515 Agunēṭi vijaya
saṁvatsara kārttika śu 12
lu śrīmadakhilāṁḍḍakōṭi
brahmāṁḍanāyakulaina dēva
śikhāmaṇulayina purāṇapuruṣōtta
mulaina kalumaḷa śrīcennakēśavaperumāḷḷa
ku śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra veṁkaṭapatirāya
luṁgāru penugoṁḍa paṭṭaṇamaṁdu vajra
siṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvīsāmrājyaṁ
sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmanmahāmaṁ
ḍalēśvara naṁdēla vaubhaḷrājayyadēvamahā
rājulu Ayyavāri kāryakartalaina kaṭahari
ṁgayyavāru vēṁṭasuṁkhaṁ dhāravōśi
samarpistimi Ā suṁkhaṁvalla vaccina rokhaṁ ce
narāyaniki Akhaṁḍatiruvaḷikalaku dasimi ma
hōtsavālaku mōdalayina paṁcaparvālku
kōdava gākuṁḍānu naḍipēdi yī dharmānaku
tapinānu tama tallitaṁḍrini kāśilō
na pāpāna pōduru celiyaliki tappinavā
ṇaṁ puṇyaṁ padarattānupāla
naṁ . paradattāpaharēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
yī śāsanaṁ lōkanāthaḍu cannarāyana
ccivēśina śāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 16.305 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
